languages.text: {n}Старейшины удивленно переглядываются и склоняют головы, не осмеливаясь поднять на вас взгляд.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Старейшины удивленно переглядываются и склоняют головы, не осмеливаясь поднять на вас взгляд.{/n}
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: {n}The elders trade astonished looks and bow their heads, not daring to raise their eyes at you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Старейшины удивленно переглядываются и склоняют головы, не осмеливаясь поднять на вас взгляд.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Älteren tauschen erstaunte Blicke aus und neigen ihre Köpfe, ohne es zu wagen, den Blick zu dir zu erheben.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elders trade astonished looks and bow their heads, not daring to raise their eyes at you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les anciens échangent des regards étonnés et baissent la tête, n'osant pas lever les yeux sur vous.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elders trade astonished looks and bow their heads, not daring to raise their eyes at you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}长者们交换着惊讶的眼神，低着头不敢抬眼看你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elders trade astonished looks and bow their heads, not daring to raise their eyes at you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los ancianos intercambian miradas de asombro e inclinan la cabeza, sin atreverse a levantarte la vista.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elders trade astonished looks and bow their heads, not daring to raise their eyes at you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}年長者たちは驚きの表情を交わし、頭を下げ、あえて目を上げようとしない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elders trade astonished looks and bow their heads, not daring to raise their eyes at you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yaşlılar şaşkın bakışlar atıyor ve gözlerini size kaldırmaya cesaret edemeyerek başlarını eğiyorlar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The elders trade astonished looks and bow their heads, not daring to raise their eyes at you.{/n}
